name: Spicy White Chile
recipeIngredient: 3 cans (15.5 oz each) great northern beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, sauté onions in oil until tender.
2. Stir in garlic, green chilies, cumin, oregano, cayenne pepper, and ground cloves; cook and stir for 2-3 minutes more.
3. Add broth, chicken, and beans; simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in cheese until melted.
5. Garnish with sour cream and sliced jalapeno peppers if desired.
Makes: 6 to 8 servings (2.25 quarts)
